specialNotes.text:
馬鞍山運動場草地足球場將於2026年5月27日至2026年7月10日暫停開放，以便進行夏季草地保養工程，跑道則會如常開放。
   在設施關閉期間，市民可使用同區的沙田運動場草地足球場。不便之處，敬請原諒。
specialNotes.en:
* 馬鞍山運動場草地足球場將於2026年5月27日至2026年7月10日暫停開放，以便進行夏季草地保養工程，跑道則會如常開放。
   在設施關閉期間，市民可使用同區的沙田運動場草地足球場。不便之處，敬請原諒。
specialNotes.zh:
馬鞍山運動場草地足球場將於2026年5月27日至2026年7月10日暫停開放，以便進行夏季草地保養工程，跑道則會如常開放。
   在設施關閉期間，市民可使用同區的沙田運動場草地足球場。不便之處，敬請原諒。

specialNotes.text:
The Natural Turf Soccer Pitch of Ma On Shan Sports Ground will be temporarily closed from 27 May 2026 to 10 July 2026 for summer turf maintenance works, while the running track will remain open.
   During the closure period, members of the public may use the natural turf soccer pitch of Shatin Sports Ground in the same district. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.
specialNotes.en:
The Natural Turf Soccer Pitch of Ma On Shan Sports Ground will be temporarily closed from 27 May 2026 to 10 July 2026 for summer turf maintenance works, while the running track will remain open.
   During the closure period, members of the public may use the natural turf soccer pitch of Shatin Sports Ground in the same district. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.
specialNotes.zh:
* The Natural Turf Soccer Pitch of Ma On Shan Sports Ground will be temporarily closed from 27 May 2026 to 10 July 2026 for summer turf maintenance works, while the running track will remain open.
   During the closure period, members of the public may use the natural turf soccer pitch of Shatin Sports Ground in the same district. We apologize for any inconvenience caused.
